CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed-No Bid") || ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") || ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - SCP Declined") || ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - Client Abandoned Proposal") || ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - No Change") || ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Implement") || ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Confirm Customer Satisfaction") || ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - No Change/Lost"), "Closed", "Open" )
CustomField.label: Open or Closed
